R Ashwin Predicts MS Dhoni’s IPL 2026 Batting Role

Jan 26, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

R Ashwin Predicts MS Dhoni’s IPL 2026 Batting Role

Ravichandran Ashwin has made a bold prediction regarding MS Dhoni’s batting role in IPL 2026. The veteran India spinner and long-time Chennai Super Kings (CSK) stalwart suggested that the legendary captain may shift from his traditional finisher role to a top-order position at No. 3.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 R Ashwin Predicts MS Dhoni’s IPL 2026 Batting Role
